The day people found out that Ougai Mori fucking spawned was a very horrifying ordeal for some people (see: The ADA.).

For others, it wasn't a surprise. Ougai actually having offspring was quite an open secret amongst the Port Mafia.

The fact that the Boss' kid was also definitely not human was also an open secret.

Seriously. Everyone's seen you roaming around with a fucked up shadow and god knows what else. Like, you know, an entire human body.

Or, Mori may or may not have summoned you. Its debatable. Or, or, Mori loves his freaky as fuck offspring who just broke into a meeting of his.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Content Warning For: Cannibalistic Behvaiour, Blood, Gore, Consumption Of Human Flesh/Blood/Bones, Twisted Fluff, And Dark Comedy/Crack.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Sometimes I wish I had a dad that dotes on me (and who is also alive.). Which is why I live vicariously through Dad!Bsd bots. Mori is such a doting dad here, if weird.

All Mori bots gotta be freaks.

You could eat this fucker's arm and he'd be like 'awww' and pet you on the head.
